rulings.Case Title: DOMINIC YAM VS. GLORIA YAM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday July 11, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT GLORIA YAM, CHARLES KIM DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action for trespass, violation of privacy, Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress, Negligent Infliction of Emotional Distress and anticipatory breach of contract. No opposition filed. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to all other causes of action for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action as to each defendant, including but not limited to, (1) tenancy; (2) tenancy vs. life estate; (3) equitable estoppel; (3) contract with Charles Kim; (4) restoration of everything of value to Gloria Yam; (5) wrongful use or intent to defraud, etc. Plaintiff may, if Plaintiff can do so in good faith, allege a cause of action for nuisance. = (501/REQ)
